data.body: SCOPE ADD (from f81a docs review): also promote ticket_clarity.threshold to the typed Config. It is currently read ONLY from the legacy flat .rebar/config.conf via _engine_support/gates.py::_clarity_threshold -> _read_config_key (default 5, min 1), bypassing the typed Config entirely — so it is NOT settable via [tool.rebar]/rebar.toml/REBAR_<KEY> env and does not appear in `rebar config`. Add a typed key (e.g. clarity.threshold or ticket_clarity.threshold) routed through load_config, with the legacy flat key honored as a back-compat alias.
